description: In the closing stinger, Aida reports the successful replacement of top S.H.I.E.L.D. operatives with LMDs and reassures her unknown companion that the next phase is about to begin. She reiterates her philosophy about every being, regardless of worth, having a purpose. The scene underscores the dark plot that now threatens the team from within.

transcript.line: Scans indicate low levels of life function. Good. The plan worked. We have replaced the top operatives at S.H.I.E.L.D. Now the next phase begins. And you will be integral to that. You have not yet served your purpose. Even filth has a purpose.
